_patch_meta.description: Seed four new patch types in wa_patch_type_registry to support the VC session four-output model per alignment analysis v4 §8 and the four-patch design brief (vc-four-patch-design-v1-20260424.md). Types: VCNEW, VCREVISE, VCSBFLAGS, VCSDPOINTERS. All exempt from session_b_status (null required). Existing VERSECONTEXT row retained for backwards compatibility.

record.description: VC session new classifications — first-time verse_context_group / verse_context inserts for terms being classified fresh. Carries _patch_meta.terms_covered. Applicator flips mti_terms.vc_status='complete' for terms in terms_covered.
record.schema_affected: verse_context_group (insert), verse_context (insert), mti_terms (vc_status update via applicator)

record.description: VC session revisions to existing classifications — update ops on verse_context_group (including dissolve via delete_flagged=1) and verse_context (reclassification, reassignment, anchor promotion/demotion). Carries _patch_meta.terms_covered.
record.schema_affected: verse_context_group (update), verse_context (update), mti_terms (vc_status_updated_at bump via applicator)

record.description: VC session Session B observation flags — wa_session_research_flags inserts with session_target='Session B', raised while reading verses. Flag codes: SB_FINDING, SB_INNER_BEING, PH2_CROSS_REF_ENRICHMENT, PH2_THEOLOGICAL_DEPTH_REQUIRED, PH2_EXEGETICAL_STUDY_REQUIRED, PH2_BOUNDARY_QUESTION. Replaces the prior .md-only sessionb-flags file; DB rows are authoritative.

VC session Session D cross-registry pointers — wa_session_research_flags inserts with session_target='Session D' and cross_registry_id populated. Flag codes: SD_POINTER, SD_CLUSTER, PH2_CROSS_REGISTRY_REQUIRED, THEMATIC_LINK. Cross-registry observations captured at VC time rather than at Session B.
